TTIPTAP
How it worksSign in

Entry

Choose your path

TIPTAP is role-aware by design. Start in the journey that matches what you do.

I run a business

Owner / manager onboarding. Configure category-native operations and enter your control room.

  • Set up business + first branch
  • Choose category: Food or Beauty
  • Generate QR and run requests
Start business setup

I’m staff / provider

A separate workspace focused on your work: requests, tips, and feedback — not admin settings.

  • Create a professional profile
  • Join a business (invite/join code)
  • See ratings, tips, tasks
Start staff/provider setup

Existing user

Sign in to enter the workspace your role grants.

Sign in

Super Admin access is not marketed publicly. Use your internal sign-in credentials.
